## Checklist

Before submitting your PR, please indicate which issues are either fixed or closed by this PR. See [GitHub Help: Closing issues using keywords](https://help.github.com/articles/closing-issues-via-commit-messages/).

- [ ] This is not a support request. I have read the README and existing docs.
- [ ] I am aware that translations MUST be made through [Transifex](https://app.transifex.com/file-browser/file-browser/) and that this PR is NOT a translation update.
- [ ] I am making a PR against the `master` branch.
- [ ] I have run `task build` or followed the build instructions in the README.
- [ ] If this includes UI changes, I added screenshots.
